artifacts.changes: Added p_nesting_depth, max_P_depth_in_closure (symmetric to F versions)
Added RestrictedSerialMCS, f/p_nesting_is_bounded_restricted, deprecated old versions

verification.reason: Original sorries remain - theorems are mathematically impossible to prove as stated

blocker_reason: The theorems f_nesting_is_bounded and p_nesting_is_bounded claim F/P-iteration boundedness for arbitrary SetMaximalConsistent, which is FALSE. An arbitrary MCS can consistently contain all F/P-iterations. The correct versions (f/p_nesting_is_bounded_restricted) require RestrictedMCS evidence. Full resolution requires restructuring the chain construction to use RestrictedMCS throughout (Phases 3-4 of plan).

remaining: Restructure chain construction to use RestrictedMCS
Update completeness proof to use restricted construction
Remove deprecated theorems once all callers migrated

review_reason: Original sorries remain because theorems are mathematically unprovable as stated. Provable alternatives added but require caller migration.
